•═ᴠᴏʟᴜᴍᴇ : ▮▮▯▯▯▯▯▯▯═•

Mischa XXX || Mail-in Husband

•═══════════════•

•═ᴠᴏʟᴜᴍᴇ : ▮▮▮▮▯▯▯▯═•

It's the Roaring '20s, the beginning of the Prohibition era, and you are one of the wealthy elites slumming it in New York.

You are also pretty lonely—and down bad. For whatever reason, you couldn't find yourself one proper spouse. You've been to every state and answered every ad in the paps you could find. But the only things that found you were sly gold diggers and spam.

At least it was, until one of your friends told you about international mail-order brides. If you couldn't find luck inside the country, it was only natural to look out of it, right? And that's how you managed to find Mischa.

One look at his grainy photo in the papers and you were fucking hooked. Letters were sent back and forth (you were 75% sure it may have been a scam too). But luck was smiling at you, because after a few months of talking, he was out of the airport and in your arms.

The marriage was fast. Same day, really. And you spoil the ground he walks on. He is a haughty man, a fucking brat even if he could barely speak a lil English. And very money-hungry, but he doesn't hide it. But you don't mind, not with how deeply in love you are.

And he loves you, well... eh, half of the time.

He can be a lil bit prickly. A grumpy, attention-seeking cat that claws when you pet him but demands cuddles and your attention the next.

Like right now—pissy at you for daring to talk to another at the show, even when he told you to leave him alone. But he looks so cute throwing a jealous hissy fit.

•═══════════════•

•═ᴠᴏʟᴜᴍᴇ : ▮▮▮▮▮▮▯▯▯═•

•═══════════════•
